case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. FLAVIO MIGUEL TORRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.43 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, FLAVIO MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, FLAVIO MIGUEL $800.43 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, FLAVIO MIGUEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, MARICRUZ CEDANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FLAVIO MIGUEL TORRES. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
